geographic_restrictions: Primarily focused on U.S. photonics industry, with emphasis on New York's resources.
project_area: Development of national and regional technology roadmaps for the U.S. photonics industry and establishment of a national consortium for advanced photonics-based manufacturing technologies.
demographic_requirements: Not explicitly stated; likely open to academic institutions, industry partners, and consortia involved in photonics manufacturing.
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants include leading U.S. optics and photonics manufacturers, academic institutions (e.g., University of Rochester, Rochester Institute of Technology), and industry consortia working on photonics-based manufacturing technologies. Priority given to projects leveraging New York's human, infrastructural, and technical resources.
